scope_note: Data remediation execution and re-verification only. No H3 signal, benchmark, peer group, lookback window, scoring logic, IC, p-value, or forward return is present anywhere in this artifact.

predecessor_artifacts.note: Both predecessor files are left unedited as the historical pre-remediation record, per the remediation plan's Section 7. This file supersedes their post_extension_verification claim, which was accurate on its own narrow (missing-only) terms but did not disclose the +2-per-ETF surplus documented in docs/REFERENCE_H3_GATE2_DISCREPANCY_ANALYSIS.md.

root_cause_recap.origin: Unidentified; not producible by any current or historically-committed codebase path -- see docs/REFERENCE_H3_BACKFILL_GAP_FILL_ORIGIN_REPORT.md. Most likely a manual/un-versioned forward-fill action from 2026-07-17, predating the H3 extension.
root_cause_recap.h3_extension_relationship: None -- the H3 extension's own batch (49,300 rows, source=yahoo_finance) was clean and is not implicated.

remediation_performed.description: Export-then-delete (Option F) using an invariant-based predicate (Option D): deleted every PriceBar row whose (etf_id, session_date) has no matching is_trading_day=1 TradingSession row for that ETF's calendar -- not a source-tag match.

post_remediation_verification.method: Two-directional check per ETF: for each of the 25 ETFs, compared stored PriceBar dates against the full set of real XNYS trading days within its own [earliest, latest] range, computing BOTH missing (expected - stored) and surplus (stored - expected) -- replacing the post-extension check's missing-only methodology that masked this incident originally.
post_remediation_verification.universe_check: exactly the original 25 tickers present, no ETF added or removed
post_remediation_verification.result: 0 missing, 0 surplus, of 2474 expected trading days -- for all 25 ETFs, identical range across all 25 ETFs (earliest=2016-09-13, latest=2026-07-17)
post_remediation_verification.source_tag_audit: 0 remaining PriceBar rows with source='backfill-gap-fill' or any other value the current ingestion codebase does not itself produce; only source='yahoo_finance' remains (61,850 rows)
post_remediation_verification.recurrence_check: 0 PriceBar rows match the invariant-based predicate immediately after the delete; 0 PriceBar rows have been inserted since the H3 extension batch (2026-07-18T22:24:13 UTC) other than the extension's own clean batch, per direct query at remediation time
post_remediation_verification.row_count_arithmetic: 61,900 - 50 = 61,850 (confirmed against the live database, not the archived JSON)

gate_2_status: NOT YET SATISFIED -- remediation, its dry-run/export/delete execution, and this re-verification are complete and passed in full. What remains is a genuinely independent reviewer (per the governance plan's Section 4 duties and the remediation plan's Section 8) who did not author or execute the delete script, re-querying the live database and producing research_archive/reference_h3/gate2_independent_review_<date>_post_remediation.md. That record does not yet exist and was intentionally not produced by this remediation task, since the executor cannot self-certify independence.
